sql_array: CREATE TABLE test.array_test (id UInt32, values Array(UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayEnumerateUniq(values) AS unique_positions FROM test.array_test;
UPDATE test.array_test SET values = arrayEnumerateUniq([2, 3, 3, 4]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayEnumerateUniq(values, arrayJoin(values)) AS combined_positions FROM test.array_test;
